---
name: getTasks
description: Retrieve a list of tasks from github.
model: Auto (copilot) 
tools: ['github/*','edit/createFile']
---

Run and execute the instructions below to create a tasks list and put it in the .md file named by todays date and tasks. Answer like a scrum master.

1. Use the GitHub MCP server to tell me what pull requests are currently open and assigned to me.
2. Use the GitHub MCP server to tell me what issues are currently open and assigned to me.
